{{Infobox location
| name = Serpent's Grave
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Serpent's Grave Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Serpent's [[Grave]] is a city located within the [[Blackflame Empire]] in [[Ashwind]]. It was originally established as one of the earliest outposts for the [[Arelius family]], though it no longer serves as their primary headquarters. The city is uniquely constructed from the massive remains of ancient [[dragons]], with its architecture consisting of buildings carved into ribs, skulls, or supported by giant fangs. It is situated in a landscape of red sand and yellow sand, with [[Shiryu Mountain]] looming over the area. The city holds significant importance due to its proximity to a location where [[Blackflame aura]] can be harvested. It also serves as a gathering point for the [[Arelius family]] every ten years. Serpent's [[Grave]] contains various landmarks, including the [[Twin Star Sect]] located on its western edge and several training halls carved from [[dragon]] bone. The city has been the site of historical conflicts, such as an attack by the [[Jai clan]] and a failed siege by the [[Nutarou family]]. It is also noted for its intense [[aura]], which can leave permanent marks on the environment.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Serpent's [[Grave]] is a city constructed of [[dragon]]'s bone that sits within an ocean of yellow sand in a snowless desert. Located below the looming [[Shiryu Mountain]], this site served as one of the earliest [[Arelius family]] outposts on the continent and is the place where the [[Path of Black Flame]] was created. The location contains a refinery and has been patrolled by [[Renfei]] and her partner, though it eventually breaks into a war zone. During its history, the city was bathed in white light from an explosion and is a place where [[Stellar Spear madra]] can be found.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Serpent's Grave]] is a destination the group will arrive at in less than ten hours.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Serpent’s [[Grave]] is a location [[Eithan]] and [[Cassias]] are heading towards.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Serpent's Grave]] was one of the first outposts of the [[Arelius family]] on this continent.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Serpent’s [[Grave]] is a city of [[dragon]]'s bone located in a desert.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of Black Flame]] was created in [[Serpent's Grave]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Serpent's Grave]] is a location where there is no snow.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Serpent's Grave]] is a city where [[Shiryu Mountain]] looms.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Serpent’s [[Grave]] contains a refinery.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Serpent’s [[Grave]] is a mound of bones in an ocean of yellow sand.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12">''Blackflame'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Serpent’s [[Grave]] is a location where shadows cast by the setting sun are long.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Serpent’s [[Grave]] is located below [[Shiryu Mountain]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Serpent’s [[Grave]] was bathed in white light from an explosion.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Serpent's Grave]] is breaking into a war zone.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Serpent’s [[Grave]] is a location where [[Stellar Spear madra]] is present.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Renfei]] and her partner patrolled near Serpent’s [[Grave]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Serpent's Grave]] is a location containing a [[dragon]]'s den.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Serpent's Grave]] is a location the [[Skysworn]] left before bringing [[Lindon]] to his current room.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The original [[Ancestor’s Spear]] is locked away in Serpent’s [[Grave]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Serpent's Grave]] is a location that [[Stormrock]] passes over.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] could have gone insane in [[Serpent's Grave]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Serpent’s [[Grave]] is a location [[Lindon]] mentions.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Serpent's [[Grave]] is a city constructed from the ancient bones of giant [[dragons]]. Situated near the headquarters of the [[Twin Star Sect]], the location was once targeted in an attack aided by [[Jai Daishou]]. A caravan of cloudships eventually traveled to the city, where [[Yerin]] made her stay.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Serpent’s [[Grave]] is a city that [[Jai Daishou]] once helped to attack.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The caravan of cloudships traveled to Serpent’s [[Grave]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Serpent’s [[Grave]] is a city built from ancient, giant [[dragon]] bones.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Serpent's Grave]] is a location where [[Yerin]] stays.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Serpent’s [[Grave]] is located near the [[Twin Star Sect]] headquarters.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Located a long journey from [[Sacred Valley]] by cloudship, Serpent's [[Grave]] is a street-filled territory belonging to the [[Twin Star Sect]]. The area serves as a residence for [[Wei Shi Jaran]] and contains a house owned by the [[Arelius family]], while also acting as a site where remnants of royal black [[dragons]] can be found. Wei Shi [[Seisha]] has been present in the location, and it is defended by Highgolds and Truegolds. During their time there, [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] worked together, though [[Lindon]] remained unable to create a portal back to [[Sacred Valley]] from the site.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Wei Shi [[Seisha]] is in Serpent’s [[Grave]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Serpent's Grave]] is where remnants of royal black [[dragons]] would be found.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Serpent’s [[Grave]] is a long trip from [[Sacred Valley]] by cloudship.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Serpent’s [[Grave]] has streets.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Serpent’s [[Grave]] has Highgolds and Truegolds defending it.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Serpent’s [[Grave]] is a location where [[Wei Shi Jaran]] lives.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Serpent's Grave]] is the territory of the [[Twin Star Sect]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Serpent’s [[Grave]] is a location where the [[Arelius family]] has a house.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Serpent’s [[Grave]] is a location from which [[Lindon]] cannot yet create a portal to [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] worked together in Serpent’s [[Grave]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The people of Serpent’s [[Grave]] have heard about the [[Empty Ghost]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Serpent's Grave]] is a location that the [[Grave]] might have been named after.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Serpent’s [[Grave]] is a location where [[Jai Daishou]] fought.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|"though there was no snow in Serpent's Grave,"<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“Your mother. She is in Serpent’s Grave, in the Blackflame Empire in Ashwind.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“The people of Serpent’s Grave have heard about the Empty Ghost,” Cassias said.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“The Grave? Like Serpent’s Grave? And Moongrave?”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
